content.description:
Item search functionality used throughout Hobson. Provides both a search function and a reusable search UI widget.

## Query Language

```
# Text search
meeting notes              # matches items containing both words

# Type filter
type:note                  # exact type match by name or ID
type:code+                 # type or subtypes (inherited)
type:note,task             # OR: note or task

# Tag filter
tag:todo                   # has tag
tag:todo,urgent            # OR: has todo OR urgent
tag:todo tag:urgent        # AND: has both
#todo                      # shorthand for tag:todo

# Negation
-type:renderer             # exclude type
-tag:archived              # exclude tag
-keyword                   # exclude text

# Field-specific
name:my-lib                # search name field
title:"quoted phrase"      # quoted phrase
```

## Exports

### `parseQuery(query, caches)`

Parses a query string into structured filters.

**Returns:** `{ text, negatedText, types, tags, fields }`

### `matchesFilters(item, filters, api)`

Evaluates parsed filters against an item.

### `searchItems(query, api, options)`

Filters items by query string, supporting the full query language above.

**Options:**
- `targetContainer`: Restrict search to attachments of specific container
- `allItems`: Pre-fetched items array (skips api.getAll)

### `getStarredItems(api, options)`

Returns items tagged with "starred", sorted by most recently modified.

**Options:**
- `targetContainer`: Restrict to attachments of specific container
- `allItems`: Pre-fetched items array

### `createSearchUI(containerEl, onSelect, api, options)`

Creates a full search interface with:
- Debounced search input (300ms)
- Results list with item previews
- "Create New" button when no matches found
- Smooth hover animations

**Options:**
- `placeholder`: Input placeholder text
- `savedQuery`: Initial query value
- `targetContainer`: Restrict search scope
- `autoFocus`: Focus input on mount
- `renderActions`: Function `(item) => HTMLElement` — when provided, each result row renders the returned element as inline action buttons instead of being clickable. Useful for multi-action pickers (e.g. Link vs Transclusion).

**Returns:** Object with `performSearch()`, `getQuery()`, `setQuery()`, `destroy()`

## Used By

- [item-palette](item://fc87b6bf-d1d7-48e1-af48-7dfb8abfbcb5) (Cmd+K navigation)
- [field-editor-itemref](item://bccf2a2b-c750-417e-9d86-b96699cc5078) (item reference picker)
- [item-search-view](item://1f8e6b48-1de3-4f10-987d-85fa7b0a437b)

buildSearchableText.description: Build searchable text from an item

matchesFilters.description: Check if an item matches the parsed filters

hasFilterSyntax.description: Check if a query string contains filter syntax

searchItems.description: Search items based on query string

getStarredItems.description: Get items tagged with "starred", sorted by most recently modified
